violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw ground beef stored above ready to eat salad items in reach in prep table cooler. Raw chicken stored above ready to eat foods in the walk-in cooler.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. The ice machine does not have an airgap.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the kitchen needs to be cleaned. Inside of the chicken breading cooler needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap dispensers were out.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. All the hand sinks were without a drying device or disposable towels.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling not designed for food service areas.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the prep tables need to be cleaned.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Exterior door to kitchen prep room not provided with self closing device.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop being stored in an empty mop bucket and not placed in a proper position to dry.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw ground beef stored above ready to eat salad items in reach in prep table cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bottle sanitizer too weak. Needs changing. Recommend using single service towels with spray bottle sanitizers.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Particle board shelving in kitchen has unsealed edges. Walk in cooler has bare wood shelving units.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep table cutting board has build-up and needs to be cleaned. Steak tenderizing machine needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in prep table cooler has build-up of food debris. Needs cleaning.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. Ice machine not provided with proper air gap on drain line.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Storage room has exposed rafters/insulation.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Grease build-up around fryers and on floor. Needs cleaning. Popcorn style ceiling not designed for food service areas.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Exterior door to kitchen prep room not provided with self closing device.
